videos.description: Tua Tagovailoa and Jalen Hurts combine for four touchdowns as Alabama dominates Ole Miss 62-7.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Alabama puts on first-half rout) 2018/9/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ta'amu connects with Metcalf for 75-yard Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Jordan Ta'amu throws down the sideline to D.K. Metcalf for a 75-yard touchdown and early Ole Miss lead.

videos.headline: Harris runs for 43-yard Bama TD
videos.description: Damien Harris blows past the Ole Miss defense for a 43-yard Alabama touchdown.

videos.headline: Alabama fumbles in its own territory
videos.description: Henry Ruggs III is stripped by Jalen Julius to set up Ole Miss in Alabama territory.

videos.headline: Tua connects with Jeudy for 79-yard Bama TD
videos.description: Alabama takes its first lead of the game as Tua Tagovailoa finds Jerry Jeudy down the middle for a 79-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Alabama shows off turnover belt after fumble recovery
videos.description: Jordan Ta'amu fumbles at the Alabama 38-yard line and Phidarian Mathis flexes with the turnover belt.

videos.headline: Harris dives in for TD to extend Alabama's lead
videos.description: Najee Harris takes the handoff and dives into the end zone for a 10-yard touchdown to put Alabama up 21-7.

videos.headline: Alabama scores 4th TD of 1st quarter
videos.description: Tua Tagovailoa connects with Irv Smith for a 12-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Jacobs runs up the middle for 4-yard TD
videos.description: Josh Jacobs extends Alabama's lead with a 4-yard rushing touchdown.

videos.headline: Hurts connects with Jeudy for 22-yard TD
videos.description: Jalen Hurts throws a dime to Jerry Jeudy to extend Alabama's lead over Ole Miss.

videos.headline: Alabama extends lead to 59-7 with pick-6
videos.description: Jordan Ta'amu throws an interception to Xavier McKinney who returns it 30 yards for a touchdown.

videos.headline: Saban: Alabama 'competed well' against Ole Miss
videos.description: Alabama head coach Nick Saban discusses his team's dominant win vs. the Rebels.
